name: command_pack_create
summary: Creates or overwrites a workspace command pack.
documentation:
Creates or overwrites a workspace command pack.

## Behavior
Creates or replaces a command pack manifest under workspace/commands.
The supplied manifest is validated before writing, including target plugin existence and command argument definitions.
Use overwrite=true only when replacing an existing command pack intentionally.

## Input Schema
Type: object
Required: manifest
Properties:
- manifest: object
- overwrite: boolean

## Output Schema
Type: object
Required: none
Properties: none declared.

## Dependencies
Libraries: plugin_runtime, command_packs
Requirements: none
Tags: commands, creation
